---
title: "Articles"
description: "In-depth data-driven analyses on Indian trade, agriculture, labour markets, and fiscal policy."
page-label: "Research"
page-band: true
categories: [Trade, Economy, Labour, Agriculture, Fiscal]

page-layout: full
toc: false

listing:
  id: article-listing
  contents: article
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  date-format: "D MMM YYYY"
---

::: {#article-listing}
:::
